/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/nextage_api.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextage_api.dir/src/corba/any_helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextage_api.dir/src/corba/corba_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextage_api.dir/src/service/robot_api_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextage_api.dir/src/api/api_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nextage_api.dir/generated/NxApiSK.cc.o -o nextage_api  /opt/homebrew/lib/libomniORB4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libomniDynamic4.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libomnithread.dylib -framework CFNetwork -framework CoreFoundation vcpkg_installed/arm64-osx/lib/libbrotlienc.a vcpkg_installed/arm64-osx/lib/libbrotlidec.a vcpkg_installed/arm64-osx/lib/libbrotlicommon.a -lm
